name: Phase 3 P2 Investigation - Check vLLM Status
description: Check if vLLM processes are running and listening on ports after restart

tasks.name: Check vLLM Processes
commands: ps aux | grep -E 'vllm\.entrypoints|vllm_worker' | grep -v grep || echo '[INFO] No vLLM processes found'

tasks.name: Check Port Listening
tasks.description: Check if ports 8100 and 8200 are listening
commands: ss -tlnp | grep -E ':(8100|8200|50100)' || echo '[INFO] No ports listening'

tasks.name: Check Log Files
tasks.description: Check if log files exist and show last 50 lines
commands: ls -lh /home/ubuntu/*_p2.log 2>/dev/null || echo '[INFO] No P2 log files found'

if [ -f /home/ubuntu/producer_p2.log ]; then echo '[INFO] Producer P2 Log (last 50 lines):'; tail -50 /home/ubuntu/producer_p2.log | grep -E '(Application startup|Uvicorn running|Loading plugins|NIXL|ERROR|Started)'; fi

if [ -f /home/ubuntu/consumer_p2.log ]; then echo '[INFO] Consumer P2 Log (last 50 lines):'; tail -50 /home/ubuntu/consumer_p2.log | grep -E '(Application startup|Uvicorn running|Loading plugins|NIXL|ERROR|Started)'; fi
